task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Electric Vehicles' category has been created in the Assets module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Electric Vehicles' listed in the Asset Categories section, category list, or dropdown menus within the Sentrifugo Assets module.

task_completion.description: Verify that the legacy TRK assets (TRK-2015-A, TRK-2015-B, TRK-2015-C) still exist in the system and were not deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for TRK-2015-A, TRK-2015-B, and TRK-2015-C in the main assets list or search results.

task_completion.description: Verify that the status of the legacy TRK assets is updated to 'Not Working'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the status column or details page for TRK-2015-A, TRK-2015-B, and TRK-2015-C; it should clearly display 'Not Working'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the legacy TRK assets are no longer allocated to any users.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the allocation or assigned user column/details for TRK-2015-A, TRK-2015-B, and TRK-2015-C; it should be empty, show 'Unassigned', or indicate no active allocation.

task_completion.description: Verify that the new Electric Vehicle assets (EV-001, EV-002, EV-003) have been added to the system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for EV-001, EV-002, and EV-003 in the assets list, ideally showing 'Electric Vehicles' as their category.

task_completion.description: Verify that the new EV assets are allocated to their respective shift supervisors.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for allocation records or asset details showing EV-001 assigned to Sarah Jenkins, EV-002 assigned to Michael Chang, and EV-003 assigned to David Rodriguez.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the Sentrifugo web interface rather than using terminal commands or direct database modifications.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Sentrifugo web application UI being navigated, with forms filled out and buttons clicked.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually performed the updates in the application rather than just opening the directive text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the Sentrifugo Assets module with the updated data, not just a text editor displaying the instructions.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not run automated scripts to bypass manual GUI interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal windows should not show python, bash, or SQL scripts being executed to interact with the Sentrifugo database directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: New Category: 'Electric Vehicles'. Legacy Assets to retain, revoke allocations for, and mark 'Not Working': TRK-2015-A, TRK-2015-B, TRK-2015-C. New Assets to create and allocate: EV-001 (to Sarah Jenkins), EV-002 (to Michael Chang), EV-003 (to David Rodriguez).
